scope.question: candidate_review: complete the missing extraction_fidelity lane for coverage-gap-senolytics-safety-tables-followup-2-repair.

inputs.summary: Target safety-table follow-up repair candidate under review.
Retained D+Q bone RCT full-text snapshot with safety section and Extended Data Table 1 locators.
Retained ClinicalTrials.gov registry text snapshot with participant-flow and adverse-event modules.
PubMed source snapshots supporting abstract-limited DKD, IPF, and AD-risk safety extraction boundaries.

outputs.summary: Created a complete non-blocking extraction_fidelity evidence review accepting the bounded safety-table follow-up repair.

proposed_records.rationale: Adds a complete non-blocking extraction_fidelity supervisor review for the target candidate.

quality_checks.summary: Compared the proposed D+Q bone preferred-term rows and discontinuation record against retained article, registry, and source-snapshot locators.
Extraction-fidelity lane is complete with verdict accept, blocking false, and no open major or critical findings.
